info.title: HRM VNU-UET API Documentation
info.description: API specification for the Human Resource Management system of VNU-UET.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of all users in the system. Requires USER_MANAGE permission.

post.description: Create a new system user with specified roles and unit assignment.

put.description: Update existing user information such as full name or active status.

delete.description: Soft delete a user from the system.

post.description: Grant a specific role to a user with optional scope and expiration date.

delete.description: Remove a previously assigned role from a user.

get.description: Retrieve a list of all available roles in the system.

post.description: Define a new role with a unique code and name.

get.description: Retrieve a list of permission codes assigned to a specific role.

put.description: Replace the current set of permissions for a role with a new list of permission codes.

get.description: Retrieve a list of all organizational units (faculties, departments, etc.).

post.description: Add a new organizational unit to the system hierarchy.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of system audit logs for security and tracking.

post.description: Reset a user's password to a default system password. Requires PASSWORD_RESET permission.

get.description: Generate and download an export file of system audit logs. Requires AUDIT_EXPORT permission.
Retrieve a list of all defined permissions in the system.

post.description: Define a new permission in the system.

get.description: Retrieve a list of all background jobs and their current status.

post.description: Manually trigger a background job to run immediately.
Upload a file to S3 and record its metadata in the database.

get.description: Retrieve a list of attachments filtered by resource type and ID.
Generate a temporary signed URL to download a specific attachment.

delete.description: Remove an attachment from the database and S3.

post.description: Xác thực người dùng bằng username, password và port (admin, cv, main).

403.description: Không có quyền truy cập cổng này

post.description: Sử dụng refresh token để lấy access token mới và thông tin user context.

401.description: Refresh token không hợp lệ hoặc hết hạn

post.description: Hủy phiên làm việc hiện tại.
Cập nhật mật khẩu mới cho user đang đăng nhập.

400.description: Dữ liệu không hợp lệ hoặc mật khẩu cũ sai

get.summary: Lấy danh sách quyền và scope
get.description: Trả về toàn bộ permissions và các scopes tương ứng dựa trên cổng (port) đang truy cập.
Retrieve the detailed profile information for the currently authenticated user.

get.summary: Export current user profile to 2C/TCTW curriculum vitae (Word format)
get.description:
Generates and downloads a Word document (.docx) for the authenticated user's profile.
The document follows the official 2C/TCTW curriculum vitae template used in Vietnam public sectors.
Includes personal info, addresses, education history, work history, family relations, salary info, and rewards.

404.description: Profile not found for the current user.

500.description: Internal server error during document generation.

get.description: Search for staff profiles based on a query string. Requires PROFILE.READ permission.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search query (name, email, or staff ID)

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of all staff profiles. Requires PROFILE.READ permission.

post.description: Create a new staff profile. Requires PROFILE.WRITE permission.

get.description: Retrieve detailed information of a specific profile by its ID. Users can access their own profile or others if they have PROFILE.READ permission.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The internal database ID of the profile

put.description: Update an existing staff profile. Users can update their own profile or others if they have PROFILE.WRITE permission.

patch.description: Update specific fields of an existing staff profile.

delete.description: Remove a profile from the system. Requires PROFILE.DELETE permission.

get.summary: Export any profile to 2C curriculum vitae (Admin/HR only)
get.description:
Generates and downloads a Word document (.docx) for a specific profile by ID.
The document follows the official 2C/TCTW curriculum vitae template.
Requires `PROFILE.EXPORT` permission.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Internal database ID of the profile to export.

delete.description: Remove the current profile avatar and reset to default.

post.description: Approve a pending profile or changes. Requires PROFILE.APPROVE permission.

patch.description: Update the employment status (e.g., active, retired) of a staff member. Requires PROFILE.STATUS permission.

get.description: Retrieve all education records for a specific profile.

post.description: Add a new education entry (degree, certificate, etc.) to a profile.

delete.description: Remove an education entry from a profile.

get.description: Retrieve all family member records for a specific profile.

post.description: Add a new family member record to a profile.

put.description: Update specific fields of an existing family member record.

delete.description: Remove a family member record from a profile.

get.description: Retrieve the complete work history for a specific profile.

post.description: Add a new work history entry to a profile.

put.description: Update an existing work history entry.

delete.description: Remove a work history entry from a profile.

get.description: Retrieve supplementary information for a specific profile, such as arrest history, foreign relations, and property ownership.

put.description: Update the supplementary information for a profile.

get.description: Retrieve health-related information (e.g., status, height, weight, blood type) for a specific profile.

put.description: Update the health-related information for a profile.

get.description: Retrieve the history of all positions and roles held by a staff member.

post.description: Add a new position or role record to a profile.

put.description: Update an existing position or role record.

delete.description: Remove a position record from a profile.

get.description:
Retrieve research works, publications, and projects for a specific profile.
Supports filtering by type, pagination, and returns a summary of counts by type.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter by work type (e.g., journal_paper, book)

post.description: Add a new research work or publication record to a profile.

put.description: Update an existing research work or publication record.

delete.description: Remove a research work record from a profile.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of recruitment proposals, optionally filtered by unit or status.

post.description: Submit a new recruitment proposal for approval.

get.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific recruitment proposal.

put.description: Modify an existing recruitment proposal. Only allowed for creators or managers.

post.description: Initiate a workflow for a new recruitment contract.

get.summary: Get pending recruitment workflow tasks for current user

get.description: Retrieve all candidates associated with a specific recruitment proposal.

get.summary: Get current user's recruitment info and contracts
Get recruitment info and contracts by profile ID

post.description: Add a new candidate to a recruitment proposal.

put.description: Update candidate information or recruitment status.

delete.description: Remove a candidate from the system.

get.description: Retrieve all commendations, titles, and disciplinary records for the currently authenticated user.
Retrieve a paginated list of commendations for all staff.

post.description: Record a new commendation for a staff member.

delete.description: Remove a commendation record from the system.

post.description: Upload a supporting document for a commendation record.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of staff titles and honorary awards.

post.description: Record a new title or honorary award for a staff member.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of disciplinary records for all staff.

post.description: Record a new disciplinary action for a staff member.

get.description: Generate and download an export file of reward and disciplinary records. Requires REWARD.EXPORT permission.
Retrieve detailed salary information for the currently authenticated user.

get.summary: Get salary info by profile ID
get.description: Retrieve salary information for a specific staff profile.

put.description: Directly update the salary information for a staff member. Requires SALARY.WRITE permission.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of all salary upgrade proposals.

post.description: Submit a new proposal to upgrade a staff member's salary grade or coefficient.

get.summary: Get pending salary workflow tasks for current user

get.description: Generate and download an export file of salary history for a specific staff profile. Requires SALARY.EXPORT permission.

get.summary: Get pending tasks for current user
get.description: Retrieve all pending workflow tasks assigned to the currently authenticated user.
Retrieve the current status and history of a specific workflow instance.

post.description: Submit a decision to advance a workflow instance to its next state.
Cancel an active workflow instance.

patch.description: Update the metadata of a workflow instance before it is finalized.

post.description: Approve/Advance a specific item (main or sub-record) in the current step. If all items are advanced, the whole workflow moves to the next step.
Reject changes of a specific item for the current workflow.

get.description: Retrieve teaching, research quotas and annual workload summary for the current user.

post.description: Submit a new evidence for workload verification (teaching, research, etc.).

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of evidences submitted for review. Requires WORKLOAD.READ.

post.description: Approve a submitted workload evidence.
Reject a submitted workload evidence with a reason.

get.description: Retrieve annual workload summaries for all staff in allowed units.
